source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Soft product English UI with calm hierarchy, large readable labels, and Japanese typography guidance for Gothic body text, restrained Mincho accents, compact status labels, and scan-friendly data surfaces.
layout: Greenhouse dashboard grids, 8px radii, powdery succulent texture, sand-neutral borders, lilac focus states, soft data cards, compact tables, command/search surfaces, and restrained shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent echeveria motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Echeveria transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an echeveria rosette succulent motif for a design-system catalog, isolated full plant with no pot, no soil, no environment, no props, and no text.
Subject: A single top-view echeveria rosette with accurate succulent geometry: layered spoon-shaped waxy leaves spiraling from the center, powder blue-gray bloom, pale aqua highlights, soft lilac-pink leaf edges, faint sandy beige underside shadows, crisp botanical edges, natural matte farina texture.
Style/medium: polished botanical product cutout, realistic but clean enough for UI palette sampling.
Composition/framing: centered complete rosette cutout with generous padding; do not crop any leaf tips.
Lighting/mood: clean even studio light that preserves powder blue, lilac edge, and sand-neutral detail; no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no pot, no gravel, no greenhouse structure, no hand, no second plant, no flower stalk, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Echeveria light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named exactly "Morphous Echeveria", derived from the previously shown transparent echeveria rosette motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the echeveria cutout: powder blue waxy rosette leaves, pale aqua bloom, lilac-pink leaf edges, sand-beige underside shadows, and desert greenhouse neutrals. Use only these motif-derived colors and near-neutrals.
Canvas: exact 16:9 landscape board, 3840 x 2160 feel, polished high-resolution source asset, crisp UI details.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, generous grid spacing, and avoid dense tiny token tables. All section headings must be legible at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: Morphous Echeveria, Echeveria Rosette, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Typography: English product UI hierarchy plus Japanese samples using short phrases such as 日本語, 見出し, 本文, 状態, 検索. Keep Japanese and English text clean and readable.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric tiles, soft charts, data table, command palette/search field, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, texture sample, radius sample, spacing scale, border and shadow samples.
Style/medium: premium realistic UI mockup, precise grid, restrained shadcn/tweakcn component language, soft design system, 8px radii, powdery succulent texture, subtle greenhouse glass neutrals, no nested decorative cards.
Color palette: Powder Blue Rosette, Lilac Edge, Sand Vein, Greenhouse Mist, Farina Surface, Deep Stem Ink, Dune Border, Bloom Accent.
Text (verbatim where prominent): "Morphous Echeveria", "Light Mode", "Palette", "Type", "Japanese Typography", "Components", "Navigation", "Dashboard/Data", "Forms", "Tables", "Command/Search", "Status", "Tokens", "Texture", "Radius 8px", "Spacing", "Shadows".
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible microtext, no misspelling of Morphous Echeveria.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Echeveria dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named exactly "Morphous Echeveria" that feels like the same system as the previously shown light board translated to dark mode.
Reference use: Use the previously shown transparent echeveria rosette and light-mode board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, typography, texture, spacing, and 8px radius. Use only powder blue rosette, lilac edge, sand-beige vein, desert greenhouse neutrals, pale farina highlights, and deep stem-blue ink.
Canvas: exact 16:9 landscape board, 3840 x 2160 feel, polished high-resolution source asset, crisp UI details.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, generous grid spacing, and avoid dense tiny token tables. All section headings must be legible at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: Morphous Echeveria, Echeveria Rosette, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Visual details: dark background derived from the motif's deepest blue-green stem shadows, elevated cards in muted greenhouse slate, foreground from farina surface, primary powder blue actions, lilac focus and destructive accents, sand-neutral dividers, soft succulent texture overlays, restrained contrast.
Typography: English product UI hierarchy plus Japanese samples using short phrases such as 日本語, 見出し, 本文, 状態, 検索. Keep Japanese and English text clean and readable.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric tiles, soft charts, data table, command palette/search field, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, texture sample, radius sample, spacing scale, border and shadow samples.
Style/medium: premium realistic UI mockup, precise grid, restrained shadcn/tweakcn component language, soft design system, 8px radii, no nested decorative cards.
Text (verbatim where prominent): "Morphous Echeveria", "Dark Mode", "Palette", "Type", "Japanese Typography", "Components", "Navigation", "Dashboard/Data", "Forms", "Tables", "Command/Search", "Status", "Tokens", "Texture", "Radius 8px", "Spacing", "Shadows".
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible microtext, no misspelling of Morphous Echeveria.
